# cap-checkbox



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Properties

| Property        | Attribute       | Description                                                          | Type      | Default     |
| --------------- | --------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------- | ----------- |
| `checked`       | `checked`       | Whether the checkbox is checked                                      | `boolean` | `false`     |
| `disabled`      | `disabled`      | Disables the checkbox                                                | `boolean` | `false`     |
| `error`         | `error`         | Error message                                                        | `string`  | `undefined` |
| `hint`          | `hint`          | Hint text                                                            | `string`  | `undefined` |
| `indeterminate` | `indeterminate` | Indeterminate state — visually a dash, neither checked nor unchecked | `boolean` | `false`     |
| `label`         | `label`         | Label text                                                           | `string`  | `undefined` |
| `name`          | `name`          | Name attribute for form submission                                   | `string`  | `undefined` |
| `required`      | `required`      | Marks the checkbox as required                                       | `boolean` | `false`     |
| `value`         | `value`         | Value submitted with the form                                        | `string`  | `undefined` |


## Events

| Event       | Description                            | Type                   |
| ----------- | -------------------------------------- | ---------------------- |
| `capChange` | Emitted when the checked state changes | `CustomEvent<boolean>` |
